name: agent-browser
description: Browser automation CLI for AI agents. Use when the user needs to interact with websites, including navigating pages, filling forms, clicking buttons, taking screenshots, extracting data, testing web apps, or automating any browser task. Triggers include requests to "open a website", "fill out a form", "click a button", "take a screenshot", "scrape data from a page", "test this web app", "login to a site", "automate browser actions", or any task requiring programmatic web interaction. Also use fo
author: FradSer
summary_zh: 一款给 AI 代理用的浏览器自动化命令行工具，能让代理直接打开网页、填表、点按钮、截图或抓取数据，适合做网页测试、登录操作和各种网页自动化任务。
